title: Artifact rationale
description: Portable rationale for a demonstrated capability artifact: why it was judged good and what transferable pattern it demonstrates. Companion to EVIDENCE entries.

artifact_name.description: Name or short identifier of the artifact.

task_type.description: Category of work the artifact represents (e.g. system design, analysis, writing, tooling).

why_good.description: Why this artifact was judged good — the quality signal, not just that it exists.

transferable_pattern.description: The reusable pattern this artifact demonstrates, abstracted from the specific context.

tradeoffs.description: Trade-offs considered during production (what was chosen and what was rejected).

review_criteria.description: How the artifact was evaluated or what review it passed.

non_portable_removed.description: What context-specific or sensitive details were stripped to make this rationale portable.

export_class.description: Which export class this rationale is eligible for. See docs/portable-record/export-contract.md.
